[Home](./index.md) &gt; [pi-ws](./pi-ws.md) &gt; [PiProcessOptions](./pi-ws.piprocessoptions.md)

## PiProcessOptions interface

Partial Pi subprocess configuration accepted from callers and config files.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PiProcessOptions
```

## Remarks

This is the library-facing input shape. `PiWs` resolves it into a full `PiProcessConfig` by applying defaults such as inheriting the current process environment and using an empty extra-args list.
